title: Whispering Spirits
description: Adds atmospheric spirits for a horror-theme
body:
![Whispering Spirits, Forge 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc9f718860d76c1609fb7b194f24852f8a92b12.png)

Whispering Spirits is an atmospheric, horror mod, which adds spooky glowing eyes around your world. If you look at these spirits, they will disappear and you'll be haunted by loud whispering. There is no danger to you, the mod simply aims to make your experience seem more spooky.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Y5nCVY9SSK8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

For the best atmosphere, pair this mod with a spooky shader pack such as [Insanity Shader](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/insanity-shader) and some other scary mods.

Feel free to use this in your modpacks.
